{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Aethertech capsule
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Parryl Cryce]] is contained within a smooth, white [[Aethertech capsule]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c11">''The Knight'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
